<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Report\Xml; use XMLWriter; /** * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for phpunit/php-code-coverage */ class File { protected XMLWriter $xmlWriter; public function __construct(XMLWriter $xmlWriter) { $this->xmlWriter = $xmlWriter; } public function getWriter(): XMLWriter { return $this->xmlWriter; } public function totals(): Totals { return new Totals($this->xmlWriter); } public function lineCoverage(string $line): Coverage { return new Coverage($this->xmlWriter, $line); } }
